comprehension_gate.instruction: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION — before writing any code, creating branches, or running commands: 1. Read this entire prompt. 2. Present a structured summary to the Lead Architect: (a) Milestone objective in your own words. (b) List of work items with 1-sentence descriptions. (c) Files you will modify (full paths). (d) Test strategy. (e) Any risks or ambiguities you see. 3. STOP and WAIT for the Lead Architect to approve. 4. Only proceed with implementation after explicit approval.

milestone.title: PA Speculative Decoding Wire-Up
milestone.objective: Upgrade the Policy Agent's GPU inference harness to use Qwen3-14B with speculative decoding per ADR-012 §2.6 PA profile. Wire draft_model, SchedulerConfig, and new runtime compile properties into the existing PolicyGPUInference class. Update GenerationConfig in classify_car(). Add tests for the new configuration.
milestone.rationale: PA is already on GPU (ADR-010/ADR-011). This adds speculative decoding config to an existing, working harness. No file renames, no imports to cascade, no entrypoint changes.

file.description: Wire speculative decoding into PolicyGPUInference: 1. load_model(): Add draft_model, SchedulerConfig, and new compile properties. 2. classify_car(): Add num_assistant_tokens to GenerationConfig. 3. __init__(): Accept draft_model_dir parameter. 4. Module docstring update.

Add/update tests for speculative decoding configuration: - Test draft_model parameter passed to LLMPipeline. - Test SchedulerConfig passed to LLMPipeline. - Test INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT and GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION merged into config dict. - Test num_assistant_tokens set in GenerationConfig. - Test default draft_model_dir from constants.

item.title: Modify PolicyGPUInference.__init__()
item.description: Add a `draft_model_dir` parameter with default value from shared constants.
item.details:
Current signature (line ~526): ```python def __init__( self, model_dir: str, device: str = "GPU", priority: int = 0, manifest_path: str | None = None, ) -> None: ```
Add parameter: ```python def __init__( self, model_dir: str, device: str = "GPU", priority: int = 0, manifest_path: str | None = None, draft_model_dir: str | None = None, ) -> None: ```
In the body, store it: ```python from shared.constants import DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH, SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED, NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS # ... self._draft_model_dir = Path(draft_model_dir) if draft_model_dir else Path(DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH) ```
Import `DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH`, `SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED`, and `NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS` from `shared.constants` at the top of the file (alongside existing imports).

item.title: Modify PolicyGPUInference.load_model()
item.description: Wire draft_model, SchedulerConfig, and new compile properties into LLMPipeline construction. MERGE new properties into the existing config dict — do NOT replace it.
item.details:
Current code (lines ~600-640): ```python config: dict[str, str] = { "PERFORMANCE_HINT": "LATENCY", "MODEL_PRIORITY": ( "HIGH" if self._priority == 0 else "LOW" ), } self._pipeline = ov_genai.LLMPipeline( str(self._model_dir), self._device, **config, ) ```
Target code: ```python config: dict[str, str] = { "PERFORMANCE_HINT": "LATENCY", "MODEL_PRIORITY": ( "HIGH" if self._priority == 0 else "LOW" ), "INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT": "f16", "GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION": "ON", }
# Speculative decoding (ADR-012): draft model + continuous batching scheduler. pipeline_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {} if SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED: draft_model_xml = self._draft_model_dir / "openvino_model.xml" if draft_model_xml.exists(): pipeline_kwargs["draft_model"] = ov_genai.draft_model( str(self._draft_model_dir), self._device, ) scheduler_config = ov_genai.SchedulerConfig() scheduler_config.cache_size = 3 scheduler_config.enable_prefix_caching = False pipeline_kwargs["scheduler_config"] = scheduler_config logger.info( "Speculative decoding enabled: draft=%s, cache_size=3", self._draft_model_dir, ) else: logger.warning( "Draft model not found at %s — speculative decoding DISABLED. " "PA will run without draft acceleration.", self._draft_model_dir, )
self._pipeline = ov_genai.LLMPipeline( str(self._model_dir), self._device, **config, **pipeline_kwargs, ) ```
CRITICAL NOTES: - `PERFORMANCE_HINT` and `MODEL_PRIORITY` are RETAINED (device-agnostic OpenVINO compile hints). - `INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT` and `GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION` are ADDED to the same dict. - `draft_model` and `scheduler_config` are SEPARATE named kwargs, NOT part of the config dict. - The try/except TypeError fallback (lines ~620-630) must also be updated to handle the new kwargs gracefully. If the fallback fires, log a warning that speculative decoding was not applied (older OV GenAI build). - Fail-Closed: if draft model directory doesn't exist, log warning and proceed WITHOUT speculative decoding. The PA must still function (classification-only, no streaming).

item.title: Modify PolicyGPUInference.classify_car()
item.description: Add num_assistant_tokens to GenerationConfig for speculative decoding. Verify existing stop_token_ids and max_new_tokens are correct.
item.details:
Current code (lines ~670-695): ```python gen_config = ov_genai.GenerationConfig() gen_config.max_new_tokens = MAX_CLASSIFICATION_TOKENS gen_config.do_sample = False # ... stop_token_ids and stop_strings ... ```
Add after `gen_config.do_sample = False`: ```python # Speculative decoding: num_assistant_tokens (DEC-01, ADR-012 §2.2) if SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED: try: gen_config.num_assistant_tokens = NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS except AttributeError: pass # Older OV GenAI without speculative decoding support ```
VERIFY (do not change — just confirm these are already present): - `gen_config.stop_token_ids = [QWEN3_IM_END_TOKEN_ID]` — correct per Task 4.12g fix. - `gen_config.max_new_tokens = MAX_CLASSIFICATION_TOKENS` (= 10) — correct per DEC-08.

item.title: Update module docstring
item.description: Update the module-level docstring (lines 1-30) to reflect Qwen3-14B + speculative decoding.
item.details: Key changes: - Replace "Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct" references with "Qwen3-14B INT4" (ADR-012). - Add mention of speculative decoding with Qwen3-0.6B draft model. - Update ADR references: ADR-010 stays (GPU device selection), add ADR-012 (model selection). - Keep all security documentation unchanged.

item.title: Update PolicyGPUInference class docstring
item.description: Update the class-level docstring (lines ~510-525) to reflect Qwen3-14B.
item.details: Current: "Uses the shared Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct INT4-MIXED model" Target: "Uses the shared Qwen3-14B INT4 model (ADR-012) with speculative decoding (Qwen3-0.6B draft model) via OpenVINO GenAI LLMPipeline on integrated GPU (Arc 140V) per ADR-010/ADR-011."

item.title: Add/update PA tests for speculative decoding
item.description: Add new tests and update the existing mocked load_model test to validate speculative decoding configuration.
item.details:
EXISTING TEST TO UPDATE: `TestPolicyGPUInferenceMockedLLM.test_load_model_success_with_mocked_ov` (line ~412): - Currently asserts `LLMPipeline.assert_called_once()` with `PERFORMANCE_HINT` and `MODEL_PRIORITY`. - Update to also assert `INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT="f16"` and `GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION="ON"`. - Mock `ov_genai.draft_model` and `ov_genai.SchedulerConfig`. - Assert `draft_model` and `scheduler_config` kwargs passed to LLMPipeline. - Note: this test uses `PolicyNPUInference` (backward-compat alias). Keep using it — validates the alias still works.
NEW TESTS TO ADD: 1. `test_load_model_no_draft_model_dir_still_succeeds`: - PolicyGPUInference with draft_model_dir pointing to non-existent path. - load_model() should still succeed (Fail-Closed: no draft, no spec decode). - LLMPipeline called WITHOUT draft_model/scheduler_config kwargs.
2. `test_classify_car_num_assistant_tokens`: - Mock LLMPipeline, load model, classify a CAR. - Assert gen_config.num_assistant_tokens == 3 was set. - Use `side_effect` or capture the GenerationConfig passed to `generate()`.
3. `test_draft_model_dir_default_from_constants`: - Instantiate PolicyGPUInference without explicit draft_model_dir. - Assert `_draft_model_dir` matches `Path(DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH)`.
4. `test_draft_model_dir_custom_override`: - Instantiate PolicyGPUInference with custom draft_model_dir="/custom/path". - Assert `_draft_model_dir == Path("/custom/path")`.
TEST CONVENTIONS: - Follow existing pattern: use `PolicyNPUInference` alias where existing tests do, `PolicyGPUInference` for new tests. - Use `tmp_path` fixture for model directories. - Mock `ov_genai` module via `patch("services.policy_agent.src.gpu_inference.ov_genai")`. - Mock `_OV_GENAI_AVAILABLE` via `patch("services.policy_agent.src.gpu_inference._OV_GENAI_AVAILABLE", True)`.

context_notes.note: The file does NOT currently import from shared.constants. The new imports (DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH, SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED, NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS) will be the first shared.constants imports in this file. Place them with the other `from shared.*` imports (around line 40-50).

The OpenVINO GenAI API for speculative decoding: ```python ov_genai.draft_model(model_path: str, device: str) -> DraftModel ov_genai.SchedulerConfig() -> SchedulerConfig # has .cache_size, .enable_prefix_caching ov_genai.LLMPipeline(path, device, draft_model=..., scheduler_config=..., **compile_props) ov_genai.GenerationConfig() # has .num_assistant_tokens ``` All of these may not exist in older OV GenAI builds — use try/except where noted.

Two tests are known to fail and are NOT regressions: 1. `test_build_prompt_does_not_contain_no_think` — tests for /no_think absence in prompt, but /no_think is now present per ADR-012 §2.4. 2. `test_stop_token_ids_constants_defined` — asserts QWEN3_THINK_START_TOKEN_ID == 151668, but actual value is 151667. These 2 failures are expected in the gate. Do NOT fix them — they are tracked separately.

`gpu_inference.py` exports backward-compat aliases at module level: ```python PolicyNPUInference = PolicyGPUInference NPUClassificationResult = GPUClassificationResult ``` These are used by existing tests. Do NOT remove them.

The existing `config` dict has `PERFORMANCE_HINT` and `MODEL_PRIORITY`. These are device-agnostic OpenVINO compile hints retained for cross-service consistency with the AO. The new properties (`INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT`, `GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION`) are ADDED to this dict. The merged dict is passed via `**config` to LLMPipeline. `draft_model` and `scheduler_config` are SEPARATE named kwargs — they are NOT part of the config dict.

- DEC-01: NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS = 3 (speculative decoding lookahead). - DEC-06: SDPA optimization ON. - DEC-07: INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT = f16. - DEC-08: PA max_new_tokens = 10 (MAX_CLASSIFICATION_TOKENS — already set, verify only). - DEC-09: /no_think mandatory for PA (already wired in prompt — verify only). - DEC-10: Prefix caching OFF (enable_prefix_caching = False).

gate.criteria: 310+ passed, exactly 2 failed (pre-existing: test_build_prompt_does_not_contain_no_think, test_stop_token_ids_constants_defined). New tests must all pass.
No NEW failures beyond the 2 pre-existing. Total passed count should be >= 749.

verification.description: Terminal commands the Lead Architect can run after the milestone to confirm success.

commit_template.message:
feat(pa): wire speculative decoding for Qwen3-14B (Task 5 M5.1)
- Add draft_model + SchedulerConfig to PolicyGPUInference.load_model() - Merge INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT=f16, GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION=ON into config dict - Wire num_assistant_tokens=3 in classify_car() GenerationConfig - Accept draft_model_dir param in __init__ (default: DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH) - Fail-Closed: missing draft model logs warning, proceeds without spec decode - Add 4 new tests for speculative decoding config + update existing mock test - ADR-012 §2.6 PA profile fully wired
Test: pytest services/policy_agent/ — 314+ passed, 2 failed (pre-existing)
